business_ideas.idea: Area/OneTech: RFID tags replace barcodes for autonomous retail checkout and inventory management.
Internet Activism: encrypted mesh networking app for censorship-resistant communication in crisis zones.
Seafair: payroll and onboarding software for 2M global seafarers with multi-currency, mobile-first.
Yofi: digital identity platform flagging bots/fraud in e-commerce and limiting sneaker/ticket drops.
Deal Dog: campus-specific marketplace for students buying/selling tickets and goods with verification.

predictions.text: RFID tagging for retail is inevitable, harder part is sales and distribution to stores.
Internet Activism will have outsized impact despite non-profit model, these founders are truly mission-driven.
